column1: # OWASP ZAP rule-tuning file for the insurance-app baseline scan.
#   IGNORE — drop completely from the report
#   WARN   — keep but don't fail the action (default)
#   FAIL   — fail the action on any match
# This file is intentionally empty on first commit. Populate it after
# the first weekly baseline run lands a report — triage the alerts
# into IGNORE (expected for a teaching artifact, e.g. missing CSP) or
